response.justification: Bogdan brings 20 years of strong technical experience and proven leadership in software architecture, infrastructure, and team mentoring, exceeding the 15-year requirement and demonstrating consistent growth as a senior engineer. However, he critically lacks the AI expertise and demonstrated AI product building that define this director-level AI strategy role—his AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is only 2 months old. While his recent pivot into AI tooling (MCP frameworks) is a promising signal and his technical breadth could translate to strategic innovation, he is significantly short on the preferred qualifications for immediate hire. Interview if considering him as a growing candidate with mentorship, but he is not ready for autonomous strategic AI advisory.
strengths: 20 years of exceptional technical breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure—demonstrated ability to learn and master new domains (D, TypeScript, Java, C++) is valuable for innovation work
Proven leadership and knowledge-sharing: organized refactoring dojos, taught multi-module Selenium courses, spoke at FOSS4G—shows ability to inspire and elevate others
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, positioned at the intersection of cloud tooling and AI workflows with strong engineering fundamentals
concerns: Only 2 months of AI-specific experience; lacks the deep AI/ML expertise and recognized AI products/platforms required for a director-level AI strategy role
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field (preferred qualification); educational background is in general CS and photography, not AI specialization

No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or partners on cloud/AI adoption, or setting product direction at a director/executive level—background shows strong execution but unclear strategic influence
